# FriendRank

> FriendRank is a multiplayer social voting game where a group creates a game, invites friends, votes anonymously, and unlocks humorous personality roles and a final group story.

FriendRank is a free web application at https://friendrank.app. Players do not need to create an account. Games are created on the homepage, shared via link, and played in the mobile browser.

## Documentation

- [About FriendRank](https://friendrank.app/about-friendrank.md): Product overview, create-invite-vote-reveal flow, privacy, tones, custom categories, and typical use cases.
- [FAQ](https://friendrank.app/docs/faq.md): Answers to common questions about gameplay, sharing, voting, results, and mobile use.
- [Categories](https://friendrank.app/docs/categories.md): Built-in FriendRank category library, what each category means, and how custom categories work.

## Optional

- [Homepage](https://friendrank.app): Create a new FriendRank game and start the invite flow.
